governingBody: Indecent Publications TribunalOffice of Film and Literature Classification
reasonSummary: The deluxe edition was ruled indecent in 1978 for "adding to the sum total of knowledge about an entirely illegal activity." The book's standard edition was ruled indecent in 1992 for being "injurious to the public.
note: The deluxe edition was ruled indecent in 1978 for "adding to the sum total of knowledge about an entirely illegal activity." The book's standard edition was ruled indecent in 1992 for being "injurious to the public good and contrary to commonly accepted.
